name: gcp-run-job-execute
description:
EXECUTE a pre-created Cloud Run Job via 'POST https://run.googleapis.com/v2/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/locations/{REGION}/jobs/{JOB_NAME}:run', optionally overriding the container args and env per run. This is the 'option 1' pattern: the operator pre-creates a `talos-runner` Cloud Run Job ONCE (see docs/gcp-impersonation-setup.md), and workflows only RUN it — this module never creates or deletes the job itself. The call returns a long-running Operation whose metadata is the Execution resource; pair this with 'GCP: Poll Job Execution' (wait for completion) and 'GCP: Fetch Job Logs' (read output) to complete the run→poll→logs pattern.

Auth is the Phase D impersonated-token path: the controller mints a short-lived (~10 min) impersonated service-account access token at dispatch time and injects it under the requested 'gcp/impersonated/<sa_email>/access_token' vault path (granted via the full-tier consent at '/api/gcp/connect-full'). Set AUTH_HEADER to that vault:// reference wrapped in 'Bearer '. NOTE on overrides: the Cloud Run RunJob API exposes only a container `args` override (not an entrypoint/command override), so pass ARGS for the container arguments and ENV for environment variables; a COMMAND (entrypoint replacement) is reserved and rejected — bake the entrypoint into the runner image instead.

AUTH_HEADER.description: vault:// path to the Phase D impersonated SA access token wrapped in 'Bearer ' (e.g. 'Bearer vault://gcp/impersonated/talos-runner@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com/access_token'). Set <sa_email> to your talos-runner service account. The controller mints the impersonated token at dispatch. Least privilege: set the module's allowed_secrets to the EXACT path 'gcp/impersonated/<sa_email>/access_token' rather than the 'gcp/impersonated/*' wildcard.

PROJECT_ID.description: GCP project id that owns the Cloud Run Job. Must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{4,28}[a-z0-9]$ (validated before the request is built).

REGION.description: Cloud Run region (location) of the job, e.g. us-central1 or europe-west1. Must match ^[a-z]+-[a-z]+[0-9]$ (validated before the request is built).

JOB_NAME.description: Short name of the PRE-EXISTING Cloud Run Job to run (the operator-created talos-runner job; NOT the full 'projects/...' path). Must match ^[a-z]([-a-z0-9]{0,61}[a-z0-9])?$ (validated before the request is built).

ARGS.description: Optional per-run container args override (JSON array of strings). Replaces the job's baked-in container args for this run; maps to overrides.containerOverrides[0].args. Omit to run the job's baked-in command. Rejected if not an array of strings.

ENV.description: Optional per-run environment override (flat JSON object of string->string). Maps to overrides.containerOverrides[0].env as [{name,value}]. Rejected if not a flat string->string object.

setup_instructions.title: Pre-create the talos-runner Cloud Run Job
setup_instructions.detail: Once per project, the operator creates a Cloud Run Job (conventionally named 'talos-runner') with the container image and default command to run. This module only EXECUTES that job — it never creates or deletes it. See docs/gcp-impersonation-setup.md.

setup_instructions.title: Grant full-tier impersonation consent
setup_instructions.detail: Complete the full-tier Google Cloud consent via '/api/gcp/connect-full'. At dispatch the controller mints a short-lived impersonated access token for your talos-runner service account and injects it under 'gcp/impersonated/<sa_email>/access_token'. The runner SA needs run.jobs.runWithOverrides (roles/run.developer or equivalent) on the job.

setup_instructions.title: Configure AUTH_HEADER (least privilege)
setup_instructions.detail: Set AUTH_HEADER to 'Bearer vault://gcp/impersonated/<sa_email>/access_token' and set the module's allowed_secrets to that EXACT path (not the 'gcp/impersonated/*' wildcard). On 401s, re-consent via /api/gcp/connect-full or refresh the underlying full-tier token.

setup_instructions.title: Chain run → poll → logs
setup_instructions.detail: This module returns 'execution_id' (short) and 'execution' (full resource name). Feed EXECUTION_NAME into 'GCP: Poll Job Execution' in a wait-until-done loop, then 'GCP: Fetch Job Logs' to read the run's output. Pass ARGS/ENV to override the command per run; a COMMAND (entrypoint) override is not supported by the RunJob API and is rejected.
